Currently on a first class flight to Dubai.

Noticed something interesting: economy passengers all looking out the windows and discussing the possibility of drone and missile attacks.

Every single person in first class is buying Bitcoin and coding with Claude.

Lesson in there.

Yes, Nvidia trades at a premium.

But few companies are scaling this fast. At 27x forward earnings, investors are paying for AI momentum.

The real risk? Growth slowing.

What's your take?
Bitcoin doesn’t care about oil prices. The bear market is almost over.

The VIX will plummet unrelentingly in to mid July. The dollar will soften. Oil will fade. The bears will completely disappear and risk assets will skyrocket. Do not be surprised if we get a major blow-off top this year. The Fed will encourage it. Bitcoin to $150,000+. IWM to $300

Guys, I hate to admit this but it’s really over this time. Unlike April 2025, March 2023, December 2022, March 2020, December 2018, September 2008, 2000-2002, summer of 1998, and October 1987, this time it’s actually really over. Completely done. Sell everything. This is the end.
I just sailed through the Straight of Hormuz. Light wind, good visibility, saw a few other yachts. No sign of conflict. The trading lane is open for business. Oil should soften this week.

BREAKING: US oil reserves are set to decline by ~41% to their lowest levels since the 1980s after the US announced a 172 million barrel release.

This will drop US oil reserves to ~243.4 million barrels, or just ~34% of total capacity.

On top of this, the Strategic Petroleum Reserve must keep about 150 million barrels in place to maintain operational flexibility.

This leaves just ~93 million barrels available to draw, or less than 5 days worth of the oil supply that normally passes through the Strait of Hormuz.

After the upcoming release, US oil reserves will be down over 400 million barrels since the Russia-Ukraine war.

The US strategic oil buffer is rapidly disappearing.
BREAKING: President Trump calls on Fed Chair Powell to cut interest rates today, before the next Fed meeting. https://t.co/VLxKmQdKi9

BREAKING: Russia is now making an extra $150 million per day from its oil sales amid rising prices due to the Iran war.

The Russian government is set to receive up to $5 billion in extra revenue by the end of this month.

BREAKING: The Iran war is now officially causing the largest disruption to oil supplies in history, per FT.

Current oil market situation:

1. Gulf producers have cut oil production by at least 10mn barrels a day

2. The Iran war has driven production to its lowest level in four years, per the IEA

3. The IEA expects world output to fall by 8mn b/d in March as a result

4. This represents a decline of over 7% from the 107 million b/d produced in February

Iran is now requiring "reparations" for a ceasefire deal.

BREAKING: The odds of Democrats "sweeping" the 2026 Midterm elections have surged to a new high of 45%.

The odds of a Democrat "sweep" are now up 5 percentage points since the Iran war began, per Polymarket. https://t.co/8zNVoOGSCe

The oil reserve release barely offsets the disruption:

The US and its allies just announced that 572 million barrels of crude oil reserves will be released.

This is ~30% of total reserves held by the US and IEA countries.

Currently, ~20 million barrels of DAILY crude oil supply have come to a halt in the Strait of Hormuz.

This means that the 572 million barrel release will only cover ~29 days worth of supply from the Strait of Hormuz.

Meanwhile, today marks the 13th day of the Iran war, meaning the equivalent of ~260 million barrels of Strait of Hormuz supply has already been halted.

In other words, the recent release only covers an additional ~16 days worth of supply from Hormuz, while WSJ reports that President Trump may extend the war another month.

This is why oil prices are "ignoring" the reserves news.

BREAKING: US oil prices extend gains to +10% on the day, rising above $96.50/barrel.

Once again, it appears shorts are being squeeze as markets reassess the Iran war. https://t.co/Dw3NAMDEDd

BREAKING: As US oil prices rise above $95/barrel, our models indicate that if current levels are sustained for 3 months, US CPI inflation would rise to ~3.2%.

This would put US inflation at its highest level since May 2024.

BREAKING: China and Cuba have agreed to boost bilateral ties just 6 days after President Trump said Cuba will "fall pretty soon."

Cuba will soon become a top priority for President Trump.

BREAKING: President Trump is "enthusiastic" about continuing the war in Iran for at least another 3-4 weeks even as oil prices rebound, per Axios.

Details include:

1. Following a G7 call, France's President Macron said "no one can tell what Donald Trump wants from this war"

2. US and Israel have not secured the 450 kilograms of highly enriched uranium that Iran holds

3. US and Israel reportedly "do not entirely agree on what winning looks like"

4. "We don't want to leave early, do we? We gotta finish the job, right," Trump said

US stocks are now down over -1% on the day.

As the focus has shifted to oil, the contagion seen in financial stocks, private credit and software combined with rising factor volatility and turbulence continues to be a warning sign.  My turbulence model is now in "crisis mode." I just put out a midweek look at charts, news and opportunities for subscribers at https://t.co/Um2sAviua2

• Oil above $80
• Credit cracks spreading
• AI disruption accelerating

My turbulence model is flashing signals we usually see after the S&P falls.

This time they're firing before it happens.

2026 looks like a deleveraging year as financial stocks say liquidity conditions are tightening

The playbook for 2026 has changed

That is happening today for the first time since 2023.  I sent out a new turbulence model signal yesterday.  It is still flashing red.  Be ready for more volatility. It will disrupt identity.

For 100 years people answered “Who are you?” with their job, institution, or nation.

AI dissolves all three.

The next scarce asset isn’t compute or capital.
It’s community.

30% of S&P names moved ±10% this month. Credit is weakening. Financials are breaking.
This started as a software unwind, it’s turning into a bigger capital-structure story.

New weekly video: dispersion → credit → private credit → hyperscaler leverage → why AI agents are compressing time.

Thanks to @Kyle for having me on again.  As the AI disruption accelerates, we went deep on how it may play out for markets and especially BTC

My Latest Substack Post: https://t.co/PUgkf2Iu3W

Breaking Bad ended. Everyone thought the story was over.
Then came Better Call Saul, same universe, new angle.

My new Substack: the SaaS panic isn’t the story. It’s the setup.
AI compresses time → moats decay faster → equity shifts from franchises to call options on execution velocity.

And the real bottleneck? Finance is still slow.
Agents need programmable rails → stablecoins/crypto become infrastructure, not ideology.
Prediction markets start to matter because they price change in real time.

Tomorrow I’m hosting a subscriber-only webinar on the market’s 2026 regime shift.

I’ll cover:

What’s changed in AI so far this year (agents + open-weight price pressure)

How it’s driving dispersion, multiple compression, and turbulence across sectors

What to worry about next (credit, financials, positioning)

How to adjust portfolios for a world of higher disruption moving forward

To learn more / subscribe: https://t.co/Um2sAvhWku

What a fucking idiot! If we do that, Iran will unleash missiles on all the desalinization plants of the Gulf, causing millions to die of thirst. Iran can also bomb all those tankers parked in the Gulf. They can also deploy a dirty bomb.

Iran has the cards you moron.

Buy the dips; sell the rips. At a good dip point here w/ SPX at 6680. Bottom line, we are going lower. US is kicking ass tactically; getting our ass kicked strategically.

Iran can:
-kill millions of Arabs by striking desalinization plants across the Gulf, causing catastrophic lack of drinking water, chaos, and global market collapse
-destroy tankers anchored like sitting ducks in Hormuz, again, collapsing the global economy
-deploy a dirty bomb, yes, again, collapsing global economy

The above is why we are not seeing mass bombing of Tehran or the take out of key power and water infrastructure in Iran. The US is scared of the Iran response. That's why all the 20x hits-harder promised by Anchor Pete haven't happened. 

The US has one huge problem. This began last year. We took out the enrichment potential, but left the 1000s of lbs of Uranium. 

Only two ways to get that, effect regime change, getting a puppet in charge who turns it over for billions in cash; or go in on the ground. 

People wonder why doesn't DJT just declare victory and leave. Believe me, he wants to, but the enriched uranium threat then remains. Israel and the deep state want this to escalate. 

If Trump truly had America First Balls, he would:

-strike a grand bargain with Russia
-US stops all support of Ukraine, in return,
-Russia uses its influence to get Iran to open Hormuz
-Trump stops all support of Israel.

Let Israel and Iran continue to fight if they want, but pull out the US, stop support of Ukraine, and take all our defense dollars to shore up Western Hemisphere defense.

But of course, thanks to the deep state & Israel lobby, this is impossible. 

Instead, my base case here is for further escalation, leading to further market collapse, as Trump succumbs to deep state/Israel pressure to go in and try to get the dispersed Uranium. 

What a fucking disaster. Trump should be impeached. 

He is a grandmaster political operative. The Barnum & Bailey of modern times. But he is a fucking geopolitical idiot. Period. He has shown that he knows nothing about complex global issues.

🚨 Extreme fear is back in the market.

You’ve seen this movie before. https://t.co/Idnp7F8rkA

🚨 IRAN JUST THREATENED TO BLACK OUT THE ENTIRE MIDDLE EAST:

This is one of the most dangerous statements of the entire war.

Trump said the US could “take apart Iran’s electric capacity within one hour” but hasn’t done it yet.

Ali Larijani, Secretary of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council, the most powerful security official in Iran, responded directly on X.

His words: “If they do that, the whole region will go dark in less than half an hour and darkness provides ample opportunity to hunt down US servicemen running for safety.”

He’s not just threatening to retaliate. He’s saying if you kill our power grid, we kill every power grid in the Gulf. And then we go after your soldiers in the dark.

This is the same guy who last week told Trump to “be careful not to be eliminated.”

Here’s why this threat is credible.

– Iran has already hit power infrastructure in the UAE

– Already struck a power station in Fujairah supporting desalination

– Already damaged Kuwait’s airport fuel systems

– Already struck Saudi Aramco’s biggest refinery

Iran’s internet has been down for 240+ hours. The country is already operating in the dark. They’ve been preparing for this scenario.

I’ll keep monitoring the situation, and I’ll keep you updated over the next few hours. Turn on notifications, this is EXTREMELY important.

Many people will wish they followed me sooner.

🚨 Private credit is blowing up

You know exactly what comes after this. https://t.co/bHB8nK8Lay
Cool. https://t.co/TvIIFtcgId

🚨 THE WAR JUST CROSSED ANOTHER LINE:

Here’s everything from the last 24 hours.

– Iran has laid approximately A DOZEN MINES in the Strait of Hormuz. CNN confirmed it. This is a massive escalation

– The US destroyed 16 Iranian minelayers near the strait in response

– IRGC fired on and stopped TWO vessels trying to pass through Hormuz, a Thailand-flagged bulk carrier and a Liberian container ship. Both hit by projectiles. Fire broke out on the Thai vessel

– The IEA agreed to release a RECORD 400 million barrels of crude oil from emergency reserves. Largest coordinated release in history

– Greece just capped profit margins on gasoline and food for 3 months. First country to impose wartime price controls

– The Pentagon told Congress it spent $5 BILLION on munitions in the FIRST TWO DAYS alone

– 140 US service members have been wounded since the war began. That number was never reported before today

– Iran says 9,669 civilian sites have been destroyed. Nearly 8,000 residential homes. Plus hospitals, schools, and commercial centers

– Iran arrested 30 people for spying, including a foreign national

– Hundreds of thousands rallied in Tehran in support of new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei

– Saudi Aramco CEO warned the war could have “catastrophic consequences” on oil markets. Called the crisis “unprecedented”

– The UAE consulate in Erbil, Iraq was targeted by Iranian drones

– An Iranian drone struck the Millennium Tower in Bahrain’s business district. A woman was k*lled. 8 injured

– Israel struck a residential building in central Beirut’s Aisha Bakkar neighborhood. 4 injured

– 5 people k*lled in a US-Israeli strike on a residential building in Arak, western Iran

– Iran’s sports minister says Iran WILL NOT participate in the 2026 World Cup in the US. “Under no circumstances can we participate”

– Trump said the war will end “very soon” but “not this week.” Also said he hasn’t “won enough” yet and wants “ultimate victory”

– White House says “unconditional surrender” will be personally determined by Trump

– White House does NOT rule out US ground troops

– Israel issuing new evacuation orders for 6 areas of southern Lebanon

– About 50% of Iranian ballistic missiles aimed at Israel carry CLUSTER MUNITIONS. 3,000+ Israeli residents forced from their homes

– Trump and Putin spoke by phone Monday about the war and Ukraine

Day 12. And Trump says it’s not over yet.

The outcome of this war will impact markets around the world, but don’t worry, I’ll keep you updated like I always do. Just turn on notifications, this is VERY important.

Many people will wish they followed me sooner.

🚨 Dubai real estate just collapsed 27% in 10 days.

We’re all thinking the same thing, right? https://t.co/4sjfOLpVYr

🚨 INSIDERS ARE RUNNING FOR THE EXIT:

Look at this data.

– Diamondback Energy: $1.13 BILLION sold

– Peter Thiel dumped $289 million in Palantir

– VRT former officer: $263 million sold

– BW Group: $210 million in DHT

– Silver Point Capital: $155 million in GPOR

– IBP CEO + Chairman: $255 million combined

– Warner Bros CEO David Zaslav: $227 million combined

– NVDA officer: $54.7 million

Out of the ENTIRE list of top insider trades this week, only THREE are buys. One CEO buying his own stock. That’s it.

Everyone else is selling. CEOs. CFOs. Directors. Chairmen. Billion-dollar funds.

These are the people who see the numbers 3 months before you do.

They have access to data retail investors will never see.

And they are all heading for the exits at the same time.

I’ll keep watching their moves and I’ll keep you updated. Turn on notifications.

Many people will wish they followed me sooner.

🚨 THE WAR JUST MOVED INTO THE FINANCIAL SYSTEM:

Iran just told everyone in the region to stay 1 kilometer away from US and Israeli banks and financial centers.

This came after the US and Israel struck Iranian banks overnight.

Iran’s response: US and Israeli banks “should wait for our painful response.”

Think about what this means.

– First it was military targets
– Then it was leadership
– Then oil infrastructure
– Then water infrastructure
– Now it’s banks and financial institutions

Every week this war crosses a new line.

Iran’s joint military command confirmed banks and financial institutions are now officially on their target list. AP confirmed it.

This is not just about missiles anymore. The IRGC also issued a decree saying “the enemy will no longer have security anywhere in the world, even in their own homes.”

The FBI went on elevated alert across the entire US. DHS warned about cyberattacks on American financial infrastructure.

Iran doesn’t need to physically bomb a bank in New York. A coordinated cyberattack on financial systems would cause chaos.

And Iran has some of the most sophisticated state-backed hackers on the PLANET.

This war started with bombs. It’s now moving into the one place that could hurt the US more than any missile ever could.

The financial system.

I’ll share more updates later, turn on notifications this is EXTREMELY important.

A lot of people will wish they followed me sooner.

According to newly released documents:

The Pentagon spent $2 million on Alaskan king crab last September.

$6.9 million on lobster tail.

$15.1 million on ribeye steak.

This was part of $93.4 billion in grants and contracts in a SINGLE MONTH. The highest since 2008.

Why? It’s called “use-it-or-lose-it” spending.

If agencies don’t spend their entire budget by the end of the fiscal year, they get less money next year.

So they spend it all on anything, including seafood.

This is the same Pentagon that just requested emergency supplemental funding for the Iran war.

The same department burning through $1.4 billion a day in operations and munitions.

Not saying anything, just putting the numbers next to each other, and I think it’s a little funny lol.

I’ll keep monitoring the war and share an update later. Turn on notifications, this is very important.

Many people will wish they followed me sooner.

🚨 The US just told Israel to STOP hitting Iran’s oil and energy infrastructure.

This is the first time Washington has restrained Israeli action since the war began.

Why now?

Iran’s Parliament Speaker declared an “eye for an eye” infrastructure war hours ago.

Every refinery Israel destroys in Iran gives Iran justification to hit one in Saudi Arabia, UAE, or Kuwait.

Washington also cited “post-war cooperation with Iran’s oil sector.”

Read that carefully. They’re already thinking about AFTER the war.

Can’t cooperate with an oil sector you let Israel destroy lol, got it?

This isn’t about peace. This is about protecting the global energy supply from an infrastructure war that spirals out of control.

I’ll keep monitoring the situation and I’ll update you in real time.

Turn on notifications. This is very important because the outcome of this war will affect markets around the world.
